mapper.select: SELECT REPORT_NO, REPORTER_NO, REPORTED_USER_NO, REPORT_TYPE, REASON, REPORT_STATUS, TO_CHAR(CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD (DY) HH24:MI') as createDt, PROCESS_DT FROM REPORT_INFO WHERE REPORTER_NO = #{currentUserNum}
mapper.update: UPDATE REPORT_INFO SET REPORT_STATUS = #{reportStatus}, ADMIN_NO = #{adminNo}, PROCESS_DT = SYSDATE WHERE REPORT_NO = #{reportNo}
mapper.select: SELECT r.REPORT_NO as reportNo, r.REPORT_TYPE as reportType, r.REPORTER_NO as reporterNo, r.REPORTED_USER_NO as reportedUserNo, r.TARGET_ID as targetId, r.CREATE_DT as createDt, r.REASON as reason, r.REPORT_STATUS as reportStatus, r.PROCESS_DT as processDt, r.ADMIN_NO as adminNo, u1.NICKNAME as adminNickName, u2.NICKNAME as reporterNickname, u3.NICKNAME as reportedNickname, p.PRODUCT_TITLE as productTitle FROM REPORT_INFO r LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_INFO u1 ON r.ADMIN_NO = u1.USER_NUM LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_INFO u2 ON r.REPORTER_NO = u2.USER_NUM LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_INFO u3 ON r.REPORTED_USER_NO = u3.USER_NUM LEFT OUTER JOIN PRODUCT p ON r.TARGET_ID = p.PRODUCT_NO WHERE r.REPORT_NO = #{reportNo}

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT ROWNUM AS rnum, A.* FROM ( SELECT r.REPORT_NO, r.REPORTER_NO, r.REPORTED_USER_NO, r.ADMIN_NO, r.REPORT_TYPE, r.TARGET_ID, r.REASON, r.REPORT_STATUS, TO_CHAR(r.CREATE_DT, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') as CREATE_DT, r.PROCESS_DT, u1.NICKNAME as REPORTER_NICKNAME, u2.NICKNAME as REPORTED_NICKNAME FROM REPORT_INFO r LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_INFO u1 ON r.REPORTER_NO = u1.USER_NUM LEFT OUTER JOIN USER_INFO u2 ON r.REPORTED_USER_NO = u2.USER_NUM ORDER BY r.REPORT_NO DESC ) A WHERE ROWNUM <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rnum >= #{startRow}
